comments.body:
I checked `main` and this is still not gated yet.

- In the daily workflow, the expensive steps run first (`Resolve daily summary provider` -> `Setup selected provider` -> `Generate daily summary`), and only then it tries to post a discussion:  
  <https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.github/workflows/agent-daily-summary.yml#L167-L216>
- The posting path hard-fails when discussions are disabled (`Repository discussions are not enabled; cannot create a discussion.`):  
  <https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/discussion.ts#L211-L269>
- The tests confirm that behavior is expected today (throw on disabled discussions), not skipped gracefully:  
  <https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/__tests__/discussion.test.ts#L64-L82>

So yes, issue #14 is valid: we should add an early pre-check/gate for `hasDiscussionsEnabled` (and category existence) before provider/runtime setup.

Sepo automation handoff dispatched: `orchestrate` -> `implement` (round 2/10).

manual orchestrate start on issue; dispatching implement

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff state:dispatched created:1777522986696 base64:aGFuZG9mZjpzZWxmLWV2b2x2aW5nL3JlcG86MjUxNDcxNjc1NDI6b3JjaGVzdHJhdGU6MTQ6aW1wbGVtZW50OjE0OjI -->

**Sepo implementation finished**

- Branch: `agent/implement-issue-14/codex-25147242798`
- Pull request: https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/54

Added a pre-runtime discussion-post gate for the daily summary workflow so provider resolution, provider setup, summary generation, and posting are skipped when Discussions are disabled or the configured category is missing. Updated workflow/docs/tests and verified with `npm run build`, targeted Node tests, `bash -n`, and `git diff --check`.

title: Gate daily summary if discussion is not enabled for the repo
